item.title: Bayer agrees to $7.25B proposed settlement over thousands of Roundup cancer lawsuits
item.description: Bayer has agreed to a proposed $7.25 billion deal to settle thousands of U.S. lawsuits that blame Roundup for causing cancer

item.title: Trump family business files for trademark rights on airports using president's name
item.description: The Trump family company wants to trademark the use of the president’s name on any airports but says it doesn’t plan on charging a fee — at least for ...

item.title: Warner Bros reopens takeover talks with Paramount after receiving waiver from Netflix
item.description: Netflix is granting Warner Bros a waiver to reopen talks with Paramount.

item.title: Pritzker steps down from Hyatt board, deeply regrets association with Jeffrey Epstein
item.description: Thomas Pritzker will retire as the executive chairman of Hyatt Hotels after details of his affiliation with Jeffrey Epstein were revealed in documents...

item.title: Grok faces more scrutiny over deepfakes
item.description: X faces a new EU privacy investigation after its Grok chatbot generated nonconsensual deepfake images on the platform
